headline: Winners And Losers Of Q4: Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) Vs The Rest Of The Research Tools & Consumables Stocks
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) and the best and worst performers in the research tools & consumables industry.
